column1: **filter_6thdiff_vert:** |br| Vertical 6th-order filter on w selector: |br| 0=off; 1=on |br| *C-O if filterSelector == 1*
**filter_6thdiff_hori:** |br| Horizontal 6th-order filter on rho; theta; qv selector: |br| 0=off; 1=on |br| *C-O if filterSelector == 1*
**filter_6thdiff_vert_coeff:** |br| Vertical 6th-order filter factor: |br| 0.0=off; 1.0=full |br| *C-M if filterSelector == 1 and* |br| *filter_6thdiff_vert == 1*
**filter_6thdiff_hori_coeff:** |br| Horizontal 6th-order filter factor: |br| 0.0=off; 1.0=full |br| *C-M if filterSelector == 1 and* |br| *filter_6thdiff_hori == 1*
